attempts.prompt:
## Better Together identity variations - Round 4.1 app icon
- Deliverable: ONE finished square app-icon source, straight-on, centered, and filling the square canvas.
- Brand meaning: two people intentionally tending one living relationship.
- Audience: modern couples who want an emotionally intelligent relationship app, not a therapy clinic, wedding product, or dating app.
- Style: premium editorial wellness identity; confident, memorable, warm, modern; crisp flat vector-master geometry with slight human-cut irregularity; no photorealism.
- Palette: ONLY warm paper #FAF8F5, coral #E5533A, deep forest #113B36, and saffron #D99A3D.
- Composition: one dominant centered silhouette; 18 percent optical safe margin; two to five foreground groups; strong contrast and readable geometry at 20 px.
- Source requirements: TRUE full-bleed square background with every corner filled; NO pre-rounded app-icon mask, rounded-square border, inset tile, transparency, mockup, device, label, caption, or presentation board.
- Originality: create an original Better Together identity. Do not imitate or reproduce any competitor, trademark, or existing app icon.
- NO gradients, glow, bevel, 3D, shadows, scenery, landscape, literal people, faces, hands, infinity sign, chain link, puzzle pieces, wedding rings, yin-yang, or decorative border.
- Text rule: when the direction requests letters, render ONLY the exact uppercase letters "BT". When the direction does not request letters, render NO text.

Use the attached approved-family source only to preserve its Better Together identity territory, warm palette, optical weight, and human-cut edge character. Create materially different geometry. Do not trace, duplicate, or merely recolor the attached mark.

## Direction - BT Sprout Cut
- Background: full-bleed coral #E5533A.
- Main mark: the exact uppercase letters "BT" occupying the central 62 percent, built from TWO broad organic cut-paper shapes rather than conventional typed letters.
- B: warm paper #FAF8F5 at left with one sturdy spine and two unmistakable open counters cut deeply into its right edge.
- T: deep forest #113B36 at right with a broad top cap and a slightly curved growing stem. The T remains fully readable and does not overlap the B.
- Shared detail: the B and T stop with a narrow deliberate gap between them. One compact saffron #D99A3D two-leaf sprout rises from that gap at mid-height.
- MUST read as exact BT first.
- NO ring, circle node, badge, tree, heart, lowercase, script, extra letters, flower, pot, roots, or outline.

## Direction - Canopy BT
- Background: full-bleed deep forest #113B36.
- Main mark: exact uppercase "BT" centered in the lower-middle of the canvas, occupying 58 percent width and clearly readable.
- B: warm paper #FAF8F5, bold, compact, with two large counters.
- T: coral #E5533A, bold, compact, with its vertical stem aligned beside the B and no overlap.
- Canopy: exactly three substantial saffron #D99A3D blunt leaf masses form one low asymmetrical bonsai crown across the top of BOTH letters, with a visible gap above each letter so the canopy is not a hat or accent mark.
- Seed: one small warm-paper circular seed sits in the negative gap between B and T near the baseline.
- NO pot, roots, ground line, ring, badge, heart, text beyond BT, tiny leaf scatter, cloud, broccoli, or enclosing shape.

## Direction - Heartwood Minimal
- Background: full-bleed warm paper #FAF8F5.
- Main mark: an extremely reduced bonsai-heart symbol occupying the central 58 percent.
- Trunks: one thick coral #E5533A stroke rises from the lower left and one thick deep-forest #113B36 stroke rises from the lower right. They remain separate at the base, curve inward once, and then open outward.
- Heart: the negative space between the inward curves forms one large, perfectly legible upright heart. Do not draw or fill the heart separately.
- Leaves: exactly three large saffron #D99A3D leaf shapes sit above the trunks as a sparse asymmetrical crown, one left, one high center, one right.
- Use only five foreground shapes total: two trunks and three leaves.
- NO letters, pot, ground line, roots, extra leaves, extra heart, circle, canopy cloud, ring, badge, or scenery.

## Direction - Heart Bridge
- Background: full-bleed warm paper #FAF8F5.
- Main mark: one unmistakable upright heart constructed from TWO separate thick shapes in the central 60 percent.
- Left shape: coral #E5533A forms the full left lobe and descends toward the lower center, stopping before the point.
- Right shape: deep forest #113B36 forms the full right lobe and descends toward the lower center, stopping before the point.
- The halves do not touch at the top or bottom and remain visibly independent.
- Connection: one short, thick saffron #D99A3D horizontal bridge spans the center gap at exactly mid-height. Give it softly rounded ends.
- The total silhouette MUST read as a heart immediately.
- NO circle seed, letters, pulse line, infinity, chain, arrow, ring, hands, faces, extra hearts, border, or badge.

## Direction - BT Garden Serif
- Background: full-bleed coral #E5533A.
- Main mark: exact uppercase "BT" as two separate custom high-contrast serif letters occupying the central 58 percent.
- B: warm paper #FAF8F5, sturdy, with two generous counters and softly tapered bowls.
- T: deep forest #113B36, slightly taller, with a broad horizontal cap and centered tapered stem.
- Growth detail: ONLY the far-right terminal of the T cap becomes one restrained saffron #D99A3D leaf shape. It is part of the T crossbar, not floating decoration.
- Accent: one small warm-paper period sits below and right of the T stem.
- MUST read as exact BT first and editorial growth second.
- NO overlap, bridge, other text, extra leaves, tree, heart, ring, badge, script, swashes, or border.
